extension.description: Manually mark skip timestamps to automatically skip opening and closing credits of TV shows. - Prerequisite: Settings - Player - Play next video automatically (enable "TV shows, Episodes"). - Modded script.keymap add-on is suggested to map two functions: "Record current time as skip point (opening/closing credits)" and "Delete skip records of current episode". Map both functions to a single button: short press to record, long press to delete.
手动标记跳过时间点，自动跳过电视剧片头和片尾。 - 使用前提：设置-播放器-自动播放下一个视频（勾选"电视剧，剧集"） - 建议使用按键映射魔改版插件映射"记录当前时间为跳过点 (片头/片尾)"和"删除当前剧集的跳过点记录"两个功能。建议用映射到同一个按键，短按为"记录"，长按为"删除"。
